creator: giffunip@tutopia.com
text:
This is a powerful Computer-Algebra System written in it's own version of LISP with quite a long history behind it.

The package was available commercially in two variants (PSL and CSL) and since some years ago it has been available freely under a BSD license. This port only builds and install the CSL version, which is very portable and has a small memory footprint but is somewhat slower than the PSL version.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: I have had this port for a while in the "wanted ports" Wiki and finally I found some time to finish it. It is also my first port that uses staging from the start.
